---
title: "Introduction to Quarto"
format: html
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

# 1. Intro

### a. about the data 

- Water samples from the Arctic Ocean
- Data downloaded from the Arctic Data Center: [Tweedie ADC dataset](https://arcticdata.io/catalog/view/doi:10.18739/A25T3FZ8X)

### b. setup

```{r}
#| warning: false
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)
```



### c. read in data 

```{r}
#| warning: false
bg_chem <- read_csv(here("data/BGchem2008data.csv"))
```


# 2. Analysis

### a. summary stats

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false

# print col names
colnames(bg_chem)

# print data structure
str(bg_chem)

# show head (first 6 lines)
head(bg_chem)


# summary of each column
summary(bg_chem)

# unique values of data
unique(bg_chem$Date)

```



### b. redfield ratio

### c. plot redfield ratio

### 3. conclusion
